metadata.title: SeedVR2 - AI Video Restoration Online
metadata.description: Restore and enhance your videos with SeedVR2. Upscale to 4K, remove noise, fix blurry footage with one-step AI diffusion technology.

page.title: AI Video Restoration
page.description: Upscale, denoise, and enhance your videos with SeedVR2 one-step diffusion technology.

generator.title: Video Restoration
generator.description: Upload your video and choose a restoration mode to enhance quality.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe any specific restoration preferences, e.g., 'preserve film grain', 'sharpen faces'...
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload a reference frame for style guidance (optional)
form.reference_video_placeholder: Enter the URL of the video you want to restore
form.upload_video_placeholder: Drag and drop your video here, or click to browse
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: File failed to upload, please delete and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Instructions are too long, please shorten
